hero.title: Why AI?
hero.subtitle: An Accessible Opportunity for SMEs
hero.description: Artificial intelligence is no longer reserved for large corporations. Today, it offers SMEs concrete opportunities to gain efficiency, competitiveness, and profitability.

productivity.title: Increased Productivity
productivity.description: Automation of repetitive tasks, freeing up time for higher-value activities.

cost.title: Cost Reduction
cost.description: Optimisation of internal processes, reducing operational expenditure.

satisfaction.title: Improved Customer Satisfaction
satisfaction.description: Personalised and responsive services thanks to intelligent tools.

revenue.title: Revenue Growth
revenue.description: Better anticipation of customer needs and rapid adaptation to market trends.

usecases.sectionTitle: Concrete Examples of AI Use in SMEs

admin.title: Administrative Task Automation
admin.description: AI tools automatically generate financial reports, analyse marketing campaign performance and track key performance indicators (KPIs), eliminating manual work and increasing accuracy through real-time data analysis.

marketing.title: Marketing Content Generation
marketing.description: AI can produce articles, newsletters and social media posts, personalised based on behavioural data and customer preferences, thereby increasing engagement and loyalty.

service.title: Intelligent Customer Service
service.description: Chatbots and virtual assistants can answer frequently asked questions, handle enquiries, schedule meetings and perform simple customer service tasks, offering 24/7 availability and improving the customer experience.

sales.title: Sales Forecasting
sales.description: AI analyses historical data to anticipate future needs, adjust procurement processes and optimise stock management, thereby reducing costs and improving customer satisfaction.
